/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/arbitrage.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/arbitrage.dir/storage/price_storage.cpp.o CMakeFiles/arbitrage.dir/fetcher/binance_fetcher.cpp.o CMakeFiles/arbitrage.dir/fetcher/coinbase_fetcher.cpp.o CMakeFiles/arbitrage.dir/detector/arbitrage_detector.cpp.o CMakeFiles/arbitrage.dir/orderbook/orderbook.cpp.o -o arbitrage  /opt/homebrew/opt/openssl@3/lib/libssl.dylib /opt/homebrew/opt/openssl@3/lib/libcrypto.dylib
